translation_findings.zh: 标有“マル秘（机密）”的文件…
translation_findings.issue: zh leaves raw 仮名 「マル秘」 inside Chinese sentence; preferable to either gloss as 「机密」 or keep Japanese with parens as the en side does (Maru-hi). The term-card row (block_9) is consistent; only the table row diverges from the term card.
translation_findings.recommended_fix: Replace with 「标注「机密」（マル秘）的文件」 for consistency with block_5 term-card phrasing.
